name: Crystal International Group Limited
summary: Crystal International Group Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in garments in the Asia Pacific, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company offers lifestyle wear, denim, intimate, sweater, and sportswear and outdoor apparel. It serves various apparel brands. The company was formerly known as Crystal International Limited and changed its name to Crystal International Group Limited in March 2017. Crystal International Group Limited was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
